innovation_1.name: 基于类MRI角度频率分析的材质反射类型解析
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that complex material reflection types can be systematically decoupled and parsed through an MRI-like angular frequency analysis.

innovation_2.name: 介质与角度方向双掩码物理建模 (Dual-Mask Physical Modeling)
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a dual-mask physical modeling approach that explicitly captures both media properties and angular directions to represent intricate light interactions.

innovation_3.name: 分量感知的自适应深度估计融合策略
innovation_3.contribution_statement: We demonstrate a component-aware adaptive fusion strategy that utilizes these parsed physical masks to achieve state-of-the-art performance in depth estimation tasks.
